title: Legal | Piel en Armonia
description: A clear legal framework for website use, privacy, cookies, and the limits of digital medical guidance.

thesis.title: Clear rules for responsible digital and medical decisions
thesis.body: Each policy explains what it protects, what it limits, and which responsibility applies in each channel.

statement.title: Legal language should guide, never confuse
statement.alt: Legal direction at Piel en Armonia

internalMessage.description: This framework organizes consent, privacy, and responsible use across digital care channels.

terms.heading: Terms and conditions
terms.summary: Conditions for using public content, remote guidance, and official contact channels.

sections.title: Website usage
items: Public information guides decisions, but it does not replace personalized medical consultation.
You agree to provide accurate information when using forms or official channels.
Misuse of the platform may limit access in order to protect the service and other users.

sections.title: Intellectual property
items: Text, design, and imagery belong to Piel en Armonia or rights holders with valid authorization.
Full or partial commercial reproduction is not allowed without written permission.
Third-party marks are referenced only for informational, comparative, or contextual purposes.

privacy.heading: Privacy policy
privacy.summary: Responsible personal data handling built on the principle of using only what is necessary.

sections.title: Data collected
items: Contact details you share through official channels.
Technical metadata used for security, stability, and service improvement.
Clinical information only when you provide it for orientation or continuity of care.

sections.title: Usage and protection
items: Data is used for continuity of care, operational support, and necessary communications.
Technical and organizational safeguards are applied to limit unauthorized access.
You may request correction or deletion under applicable regulation.

cookies.heading: Cookie policy
cookies.summary: Cookie use for technical functions, aggregate measurement, and browsing preferences.

sections.title: Cookie categories
items: Essential: support navigation, security, and site stability.
Analytics: measure aggregate use to improve content, pathways, and performance.
Preferences: remember interface and language settings.

sections.title: Consent management
items: You may accept or reject non-essential cookies.
Preferences can be updated through your browser or system tools.
Rejecting optional cookies does not block access to the main site content.

medical-disclaimer.heading: Medical disclaimer
medical-disclaimer.summary: Public content informs, but it does not replace personalized diagnosis or treatment direction.

sections.title: Limits of digital guidance
items: Public text is not a prescription, a final indication, or a promise of outcome.
Any treatment decision requires individualized evaluation by qualified health professionals.
Warning signs should be addressed immediately through urgent care when appropriate.

sections.title: Shared responsibility
items: You should report history and symptoms with reasonable accuracy.
Clinical direction is defined through evidence, history, and medical examination.
Adherence to the plan directly influences how a case progresses.
